name: Breakfast Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the Canadian bacon in a skillet until cooked through.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the Egg Beaters and salsa.
3. Cook the hash browns in the skillet until they are golden brown.
4. Pour the Egg Beaters mixture into the skillet with the cooked hash browns and stir occasionally until heated through.
5. Spoon the mixture into fajita-sized flour tortillas, rolling them up tightly.
6. Place the rolled-up tortillas in freezer bags and freeze for later use.
7. To serve, place a roll-up in a microwave-safe dish, cover it, and heat for 1 minute per burrito (adjust time as needed).
